item.title: Version 2026.03.07
item.description:
What's New in 2026.03.07

  • Upgraded transcription model to Whisper medium — replaces the previous `small` model with `medium` (~1.5 GB), yielding significantly better accuracy for multilingual users. Eval across English, Greek, Spanish, and Japanese recordings showed average WER drop from 8% → 2%, with Greek improving by ~26% WER (previously producing garbled output on common words). English and Japanese remain at 0% WER.
  • Disabled timestamp tokens during decoding (`withoutTimestamps: true`) — removes timestamp-token interference from the decode sequence, improving word-boundary accuracy across all models.

All transcription happens 100% locally on your device.
